name: Money pages + schema
goal: Launch head-term landing pages and shared schema components
ship_when: Core templates, metadata and reg-input CTA are stable
success_gate: Search Console indexing + conversion tracking in place

name: Top 100 models + issue hubs
goal: Publish the highest-confidence model pages plus problem/advisory hubs
ship_when: Unique value blocks are working (repair exposure, MOT trends, buyer guidance)
success_gate: At least 30% of pages indexed and non-zero conversions from organic

name: Brand x issue and brand x advisory
goal: Broaden long-tail coverage with brand-level issue pages
ship_when: Internal linking + canonical rules are stable
success_gate: No thin-page spike; page quality / engagement holds

name: Model x advisory / model x problem scale
goal: Expand into the 100k opportunity using only supported combinations
ship_when: You can gate pages by real data density and suppress weak combinations
success_gate: Indexing rate acceptable; crawl budget not wasted

name: Iterative scale-up
goal: Add more supported combinations, refresh top pages, prune low-value pages
ship_when: Top templates have proven rankings and conversions
success_gate: Quarterly content QA + automated noindex rules for thin pages
